probe: coverage_01345_max.fit — per-pixel coverage of the set-01+03+04+05 max compose (value/1000 = covering sub-stack members; Siril does every pixel op: stored register -2pass regdata -> seqapplyreg -framing=max -> stack sum)
member_source: the four sets' kept group sub-stacks (sessions/<session>/work/groups_set-{01,03,04,05})
canvas_matches_product: stack_set-01+03+04+05_max.fit is 8493x6428 — the coverage_probe.sh validity gate (same registration reference) PASSES; the map is authoritative for that product's framing
clip_ceiling: Max is CLIPPED at 65535: Siril normalizes 16-bit input to [0,1], so the 1000-ADU constants saturate the sum at 65.535 members regardless of the 32-bit output. Pixels covered by 66-87 members are indistinguishable at 65535. VALID for any coverage threshold N <= 65 (the cov25-class checks); a future probe with >65 members must shrink the fill constant so members*fill <= 65535
build_notes: applied+summed from the probe's stored registration (the registration itself predates this build); single-pass seqapplyreg (chunked partial sums are a measured dead end: the residual pure-translation regdata the applied sequence carries is CHUNK-relative, so partials land on different origins and cannot be summed); stack step runs set32bits because 87*1000 exceeds the 16-bit ceiling the original script pinned; a deselected reference nulls the .seq reference field (restored via setref, image 43 1-based)
verified: Siril stat on the map (numbers above) + astropy header dims vs the product header — metadata reads only
